name: jtop 监控
desc: jetson-stats 系统监控工具，实时查看 GPU / CPU / 内存使用率

name: Jupyter Lab
desc: 交互式 Python 开发环境，支持 GPU 监控插件

name: Node-RED
desc: 可视化流程编排工具，IoT 与边缘计算场景适用

name: YOLOv26 Dual GMSL
desc: 基于双路 GMSL 相机的 YOLOv26 TensorRT 视觉系统，运行检测、姿态和分割三路推理。
check_cmd: bash -c 'export PATH=$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH && test -x /home/seeed/yolov26_jetson/run_dual_gmsl_local.sh && test -f /home/seeed/ultralytics_data/yolov26n.engine && python3 -c "import ultralytics, torch, torchvision, onnxruntime" 2>/dev/null'
install_cmds: sudo apt-get install -y git python3-pip v4l-utils libcusparselt0
python3 -m pip uninstall -y torch torchvision || true

bash -c 'export PATH=$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH && python3 -c "import ultralytics, torch, torchvision, onnxruntime; print(ultralytics.__version__); print(torch.__version__); print(torchvision.__version__); print(onnxruntime.__version__)"'
bash -c 'export PATH=$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH && cd /home/seeed/ultralytics_data && [ -f yolov26n.engine ] || yolo export model=yolov26n.pt format=engine device=0 half=True'
bash -c 'export PATH=$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH && cd /home/seeed/ultralytics_data && [ -f yolov26n-pose.engine ] || yolo export model=yolov26n-pose.pt format=engine device=0 half=True'
bash -c 'export PATH=$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH && cd /home/seeed/ultralytics_data && [ -f yolov26n-seg.engine ] || yolo export model=yolov26n-seg.pt format=engine device=0 half=True'
